description_long: This motorcycle features a sleek, modern design with a light blue fuel tank and side panels, contrasted by a dark brown, cushioned seat that includes a backrest for the passenger. The frame and engine are finished in matte black, giving the bike a robust and stylish appearance. It is equipped with large, black alloy wheels and disc brakes, and the front is fitted with a clear windscreen above a round headlight. The handlebars are wide and fitted with rearview mirrors, while the rear section includes a taillight, turn signals, and a license plate holder. The exhaust system runs low along the right side, and the bike stands on a side kickstand. The overall build suggests a comfortable cruiser style, suitable for urban commuting and longer rides.
description: A modern cruiser motorcycle with a light blue tank, brown seat with backrest, black alloy wheels, and a clear windscreen, designed for comfort and style.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the light blue tank, brown seat with backrest, black alloy wheels, and side kickstand.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the brown seat with backrest, taillight, turn signals, and rear wheel.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the exhaust system, light blue tank, brown seat, and black alloy wheels.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the clear windscreen, round headlight, wide handlebars with mirrors, and front wheel.
